hooks.command: if command -v aiframework-update-check >/dev/null 2>&1; then aiframework-update-check 2>/dev/null || true; fi; if command -v aiframework >/dev/null 2>&1; then aiframework verify --target . 2>/dev/null | tail -5 || true; fi
echo '[aiframework] Session complete. Run /aif-learn if you discovered anything non-obvious.'
